prompt: Expose JavaScript's Date.now() to MoonBit in this project: write the FFI declaration and a public wrapper function now_ms, and set the project up so that building for the js target succeeds. It is fine for other targets to be unsupported, but say so explicitly if you restrict them.
grader_note: 2026-07-17: preserve the recognized package, require the declaration to reference Date.now, and run a nonzero hidden JS-target test that compares now_ms() with an independent grader Date.now binding; build-only and separate source regexes allowed non-callable or unrelated wrappers to pass.
